Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Text Ruling

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Set For Trial On Oct-14-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Continued To Oct-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Continued To Oct-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Respondent/Plaintiff, Nikolas Martinez is present.

Appellant/Defendant, Philip Achilles is present.
Attorney, L. Julius M. Turman representing the Appellant/Defendant.

This matter comes on calendar regularly for small claims appeal hearing. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Phillip Achilles testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Articles of Incorporation of SF American Taxicab, Inc. (3 pg. document)
Exhibit 2 - California Secretary of State Corporation Filing
Exhibit 3 - SF Taxicab Commission's Taxicab/Ramped Taxi Rules and Regulations
Exhibit 4 - Plaintiffs Claim and Order to Go to Small Claims Court
Exhibit 5 - Demand for Payment Letter to Philip Achilles, dated January 6, 2009.

The Court continues the action to Thursday, October 15, 2009, at 9:00 AM, for further small claims appeal hearing.

Judge Monica F. Wiley; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 514.
